arts.ttl: Richarlison provides update on injury with two-word message ahead of Tottenham vs Man United
arts.sum: Richarlison has hinted that he is closing in on a return to action ahead of Tottenham's Carabao Cup quarter-final tie against Manchester United. Should Spurs beat United on Thursday then they will face a Carabao Cup first-leg semi-final tie in that midweek before a trip to Tamworth in the FA Cup on the following Sunday.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe pumps another £79m into Man United to increase his stake in the club - but here's why the huge cash injection will NOT benefit Ruben Amorim in the January window
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: The petrochemicals billionaire paid around £1.2billion for 27.7 per cent of the club earlier this year and agreed to invest $300million (£237m) as part of the deal.

arts.ttl: Diogo Dalot determined to set record straight at Spurs
arts.sum: In football, you can only be as good as your last game. So, obviously, it's important because we won against a really good team that has been dominating English football for a while.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane encourages Marcus Rashford to make bold transfer – 'It works for everybody’
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford looks to be coming to the end of his time at Manchester United, and Roy Keane thinks he knows what would be best for the striker

arts.ttl: 17 G/A man was sold for just £20m, it would now cost Liverpool & Man Utd £53m to sign Chelsea flop
arts.sum: Chelsea have made some major mistakes in the transfer market in their time – most notably Kevin De Bruyne and Mohamed Salah – and it now looks like we could add Christian Pulisic to that list. arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Saudi Pro League to reject Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: The Saudi Pro League will not look to sign Marcus Rashford, who is looking for a way out of Manchester United . "I've seen how other players have left in the past and I don't want to be that person.
